name: hearthburrow
description: A cozy top-down procedural mining roguelite

scripts.package:itch: npm run build:itch && python3 -c "import zipfile,os;z=zipfile.ZipFile('hearthburrow-itch.zip','w',zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED);[z.write(os.path.join(r,f),os.path.relpath(os.path.join(r,f),'dist')) for r,_,fs in os.walk('dist') for f in fs];z.close()"
